{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Northstrider's draconic authority
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] possesses draconic authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
